Name: kick
Description: A swift low strike that lands while your weapon recovers.

Name: rescue
Description: Intercept an enemy attacking a weaker ally, forcing it to target you.

Name: bash
Description: Slam a target, dealing minor damage and staggering its next pulse.

Name: armor optimization
Description: Wear heavy armor more efficiently, adding to torso and head protection.

Name: disarm
Description: A technical strike with a chance to knock the target's weapon to the floor.

Name: second wind
Description: Recover a burst of health once per fight when dropping below a threshold.

Name: dual-wield specialization
Description: Remove the penalty on off-hand strikes.

Name: taunt
Description: A battlecry that forces unengaged aggressive NPCs to target you.

Name: cleave
Description: A sweeping strike: full damage to the target, half to others in combat.

Name: blind-fight
Description: Maintain full accuracy and dodge in rooms with environmental blindness.

Name: parry
Description: A chance each round to fully negate an enemy's main-hand strike.

Name: lunge
Description: Open combat with a high-accuracy strike dealing maximum weapon damage.

Name: critical mastery
Description: Maximum natural weapon rolls become critical strikes, doubling damage.

Name: berserk
Description: Rage for a few ticks: more damage and Charm/Fear immunity, no armor.

Name: counterstrike
Description: On a successful parry, execute a free out-of-turn main-hand attack.

Name: decapitate
Description: Execute a low-health foe for colossal damage, destroying its gear.

Name: indomitable will
Description: Permanent Fear immunity and a flat cut to Magic and Psychic damage.

Name: onslaught
Description: Five consecutive main-hand attacks, each hitting harder than the last.

Name: peek
Description: Automatically glimpse the inventories of NPCs when you look.

Name: magic missile
Description: Bolts of pure arcane force that ignore armor and shields.

Name: minor heal
Description: Restore a small amount of health to yourself or an ally.

Name: entangle
Description: Roots bind a target, preventing flee or movement for a couple of rounds.

Name: shoot
Description: Fire a ranged weapon at a target, even from an adjacent room.
